title: ITS2 metabarcoding protocol

steps: Prepare the mix: undetermined, molecular grade water undetermined, Q5 polymerase buffer undetermined, ITS2-S2F primer undetermined, ITS2-4R primer 0.16 µL, dNTPs (25 mM each) undetermined, Q5 Hot Start polymerase
Prepare the mix: undetermined, molecular grade water undetermined, Q5 reaction buffer undetermined, dNTPs (25 mM each) undetermined, Q5 Hot Start polymerase
Perform AMPure purification with ratio 1x. Elute in 10 μl. AMPure purification protocol by Tomasz Suchan
Run the PCR program: 30 s denaturation at 98°C; 12 cycles of denaturation at 98 °C for 10 s, combined annealing and extension at 72°C for 30 s (shuttle PCR); the final extension at 72°C for 5 min.

Pool all the samples together. The sample concentrations can be normalized at this step, depending on the experimental questions. Purify the samples separately using AMPure, quantify and pool in the equimolar proportions. Alternatively you can use bead-based normalization, e.g: doi: 10.1186/1471-2164-15-645 .
Perform AMPure purification with ratio 1x. Elute in 100 μl. AMPure purification protocol by Tomasz Suchan
Check the concentration using Qubit and the profile using Tapestation/Fragment Analyzer. Calculate molarity from that and proceed to the sequencing. Add 15% PhiX to the sequencing run.

Run the PCR program: initial denaturation at 98°C for 5 min; 20 cycles of denaturation at 98°C for 40 s, annealing at 49°C for 40 s and elongation at 72°C for 40 s; followed by a final extension step at 72°C for 5 min.

Add 2 μl of the sample to 18 μl of the mix. Use water instead of the sample for the blanks. Add one blank sample at this step (= "PCR blank") and also use the blank from the DNA extraction step (= "extraction blank").
Add 1 μl of the template to 7 μl of the mix.
Add 1 μl of each 5 uM primer (forward and reverse). Use different pair of indexed primers for each sample.
creator: Tomasz Suchan
